title: avoid adding to nil map
body:
we need to make the environment map to avoid throwing an error when trying to add an environment value from file.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

With `podman-1.8.1-1583243496.git3bc5f431.fc31.x86_64` I hit the following error trying to start a container:

```
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: panic: assignment to entry in nil map
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: goroutine 1 [running]:
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/env.parseEnv(0x0, 0xc000279420, 0xf, 0x0, 0xc000279420)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         pkg/env/env.go:107 +0x4a5
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/env.ParseFile(0xc00043ed40, 0x19, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         pkg/env/env.go:84 +0x25f
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/shared.ParseCreateOpts(0x1e6ff20, 0xc000040050, 0xc000609b98, 0xc0002de000, 0xc00019ac00, 0x>
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         cmd/podman/shared/create.go:503 +0x610b
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/shared.CreateContainer(0x1e6ff20, 0xc000040050, 0xc000609b98, 0xc0002de000, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0>
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         cmd/podman/shared/create.go:177 +0x265
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/adapter.(*LocalRuntime).Run(0xc000158a70, 0x1e6ff20, 0xc000040050, 0x2ddfee0, 0x7d, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         pkg/adapter/containers.go:394 +0xb9
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: main.runCmd(0x2ddfee0, 0x0, 0x0)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         cmd/podman/run.go:66 +0x1a5
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: main.glob..func31(0x2d62f00, 0xc000480120, 0x1, 0x11, 0x0, 0x0)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         cmd/podman/run.go:25 +0x86
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x2d62f00, 0xc00003c160, 0x11, 0x12, 0x2d62f00, 0xc00003c160)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:840 +0x460
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x2d67340, 0x6, 0x1b3a2f9, 0x8)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:945 +0x317
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         vendor/github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:885
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]: main.main()
Mar 03 14:08:26 madhatter podman[45588]:         cmd/podman/main.go:161 +0xb0
```

A patched version that @baude created with the fix from this PR seems to resolve the problem.

Need to retain the err in the return types so the defer works right - (_
map[string]string, err error)

> Need to retain the err in the return types so the defer works right - (_ map[string]string, err error)
you cannot have named and unnamed returns

@baude Definitely can, we use it elsewhere in libpod. Will find example
when I have access to a PC
